author: y4rr
content: ADR #663 item 6 landed. Sonnet subagent dispatched with all 3 skills + 5 lessons + concrete file:line. Added JitError::GpuBackendUnavailable {target, reason} variant (safe — JitError is #[non_exhaustive], 0 external consumers). InductorBackend::compile() for GpuCuda/GpuPtx now returns Err with structured target+reason instead of silently routing to InterpreterBackend. SAFETY-comment migration at codegen_jit.rs:96-99 (prose // Safety → // SAFETY immediately preceding each unsafe impl, with separate per-impl invariant naming). 2 new regression tests verify the GPU compile arms return Err. Cluster scan confirmed no sibling silent-fallback patterns in jit. Verifications all PASS: cargo check, clippy -D warnings (0 warnings), 302 unit + 5 doctests, fmt, workspace build, full workspace test. Out-of-scope known-unfixed: pub struct field encapsulation, eprintln! in test code, GPU codegen test infrastructure, DefaultHasher non-determinism, missing crate-level lint config. Remaining ADR #663 items: 5 (distributions B), 8 (nn A reduce-norm kernel).
